model_tiers._note: Alias-only. The Agent tool's model override accepts opus|sonnet|haiku, NOT pinned minor versions. Do not hardcode 4.x numbers anywhere; they drift and cannot be passed.

v4_changes: Rebranded v3.x -> v4.0; aligned banner, CLAUDE.md, statusline, version.json
SECURITY: new safety-guard.sh PreToolUse hook (Bash/Write/Edit) hard-blocks catastrophic/exfil actions + enforces the calculator lock — replaces prose-only 'Auto-Mode Safety Checklist'
FIX: resource-guard.sh now exits 2 to actually block (was exit 1, a no-op) and captures the resource-check exit code correctly (was masked by '|| echo')
FIX: statusline is pure ASCII — removed ANSI escapes + emoji that corrupted TUI width calc and leaked SGR mouse reports into the input line
FIX: removed dead Fast-Mode logic (premise 'fast = Opus 4.6, no thinking' is false; regex false-positived Sonnet 4.6)
FIX: gitnexus-refresh.sh guards on cwd and no longer auto-runs 'npx analyze' at session start
FIX: ram-monitor.sh rotates its log (was 39MB/210k lines) and samples writes
FIX: resource-check.sh drops the meaningless process-count block (in-process teammates aren't separate processes)
Model tiering is alias-only (opus/sonnet/haiku); removed stale 4.7/4.6 pins
Integrity: safety-guard.sh + gitnexus-refresh.sh are now checksum-tracked (were not)
SLIM: cut mandatory progress-bar injection, printed Pre-Flight block, always-on banner render, and OP-Mode/wave/rate-zone machinery — defer orchestration to the native Workflow tool
Config is now a git repo (github.com/frogody/superboost-v4) so edits are recoverable
